identity.name: Maria Santos
identity.bio: Freelance designer who chases good light, good food, and weird thrift store finds.

career.career_aspiration: Build a small boutique agency (3-5 people), create a design course
career.past_roles: Junior designer at a Portland agency (2021-2023), internship at Nike (2020)

health.fitness_goals: Consistent daily movement, flexibility, stress management

food.favorite_foods: Pad kra pao (tofu), injera with lentil stews, jackfruit carnitas
food.disliked_foods: Anything with artificial sweeteners, raw bell peppers
food.coffee_tea: Oat milk cortado, herbal tea in the evening
food.alcohol: Natural wine, mezcal occasionally, mostly don't drink

home.home_projects: Turning the spare closet into a photo backdrop setup

finance.financial_goals: Build 6-month emergency fund, start retirement savings, stabilize income to $8k/mo
finance.side_income: Sell prints on Etsy, occasional photography gigs

hobbies.favorite_games: Stardew Valley, Wordle, card games with friends
hobbies.favorite_artists: Adrianne Lenker, Caetano Veloso, Japanese Breakfast, SZA
hobbies.tv_movies: Fleabag, Past Lives, Portrait of a Lady on Fire, Neon Genesis Evangelion
hobbies.books_reading: Currently reading 'The Creative Act' by Rick Rubin, love Haruki Murakami and Octavia Butler
hobbies.sports_follow: None really, casually watch the World Cup

personality.pet_peeves: Scope creep without budget adjustment, ghosting, design-by-committee

aspirations.life_goals: Build a sustainable creative business, travel to 30 countries, write and illustrate a book
aspirations.learning_now: Motion design (After Effects), Portuguese improvement, business finances
aspirations.challenges: Irregular freelance income, saying no to projects, imposter syndrome
aspirations.proudest_achievement: Rebranded a B-corp that won a regional design award
aspirations.biggest_fear: Never feeling financially stable as a creative
aspirations.ideal_day: Wake up early, yoga, farmers market, deep design work at a cafe, cook a big meal, film photography walk at golden hour
